writes.content: Redis uses the BSD license with no additional licensing fees — estimated annual cost savings of ~$20,000
Redis has high community activity with 60k+ GitHub stars and abundant documentation and troubleshooting resources
Redis handles 100k QPS per instance, comfortably meeting our 50k peak demand with 2x headroom
After weighing cost, community support, and performance, we chose Redis as our caching layer

query.text: Why did we choose Redis for caching
